case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR DANIEL JOSEPH KELLY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-15-2002 THROUGH JAN-13-2003.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, DANIEL J. KELLY TO COUNSELS: ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: NOV-18-02 AT 3:30 PM.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-18-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE AT TRIAL PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 6.1C FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ROBINSON, JAMES

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-10-2002.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-18-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE COMPLAINT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COST AND FEES.
